manifest.title: LightGBM: A Highly Efficient Gradient Boosting Decision Tree
manifest.authors: Ke, Meng, Finley, Wang, Chen, Ma, Ye, Liu
claims: Histogram-based GBDT improves tabular regression speed and accuracy vs level-wise boosting.
Leaf-wise growth with regularization supports strong baselines on heterogeneous numeric features.
Pairs with heterogeneous column preprocessing (ColumnTransformer) on tabular well-log features.

gaps.claim: Ke et al. 2017 LightGBM histogram GBDT
